name: hdd-worker
description: HORSE DRIVEN DEVELOPMENT worker (HDD M0). Bun-based daemon for the BMAD-driven autonomous pipeline.

scripts.lint: biome check src tests && eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern src tests
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src tests && eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern --fix src tests
